chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Adultery

text: 4978 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "اَلزِّنَا يُورِثُ اَلْفَقْرَ وَ يَدَعُ اَلدِّيَارَ بَلاَقِعَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4978 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Adultery brings about poverty and leaves homes deserted."
